description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style shelving unit featuring three spacious wooden shelves supported by a dark, metal frame. The frame is constructed with thick, square metal tubing and reinforced with cross-bracing on the sides and back for added stability. The wood shelves have a natural, slightly weathered finish, contrasting with the matte, almost black metal structure. The open design allows for easy access from all sides, making it suitable for storing or displaying items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or lofts. The absence of doors, drawers, or handles emphasizes its utilitarian function. The overall construction suggests durability and the ability to support heavy objects.
description: A sturdy, industrial shelving unit with three wooden shelves and a reinforced dark metal frame. Its open, cross-braced design is ideal for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three wooden shelves framed by thick, dark metal with visible cross-bracing on the sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metal cross-bracing and the depth of the wooden shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with cross-bracing visible and open access to all shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the cross-bracing and shelf depth.
